97.reason: [The function name 'delete' is a reserved keyword in C++ and may cause compilation issues with some compilers even in C mode, especially if headers include C++-style macros or if compiled as C++. Additionally, the parameter 'n' is unused.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The function name 'delete' is a reserved keyword in C++ and may cause compilation issues with some compilers even in C mode, especially if headers include C++-style definitions or if compiled with C++ compiler.
